S9(7) to S9(9). 

SHORT NAME: PHYTHAMT 

LONG NAME: PHYS_THRPY_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total charge amount associated with revenue 
center code 042X from all claim records included in the stay.
